requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility / Radio — Household Refrigerating Appliances (ZWS / CISPR 14 series; POTRAZ for radio)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容/无线电——家用制冷器具（ZWS / CISPR 14系列；无线电由POTRAZ管理）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容/無線電——家用製冷器具（ZWS / CISPR 14系列；無線電由POTRAZ管理）

summary.en: Zimbabwe does not operate a single horizontal EMC directive in the EU sense. Electromagnetic disturbance for household appliances is addressed through ZWS standards adopted by SAZ from the international CISPR 14 family — CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) — typically mirrored via IEC/SANS adoptions, and verified through SAZ conformity assessment or import inspection where applicable. The same CISPR 14 international basis underlies the Chinese GB 4343 series, so the underlying emission/immunity limits are broadly comparable. Separately, any radio-frequency function (for example Wi-Fi or Bluetooth in a smart/connected refrigerator) falls under the Postal and Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Zimbabwe (POTRAZ), which administers type approval / authorisation of radio and telecommunications equipment; a connected appliance generally requires POTRAZ type approval in addition to electrical-safety and EMC conformity. A basic non-connected refrigerator has no radio function and is outside POTRAZ scope.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦不设欧盟意义上的单一横向电磁兼容指令。家用器具的电磁骚扰通过SAZ从国际CISPR 14族采用的ZWS标准管理——CISPR 14-1（发射）和CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）——通常经IEC/SANS采用对应，并在适用时通过SAZ合格评定或进口检验核实。中国GB 4343系列同样以CISPR 14国际标准为基础，因此底层发射/抗扰度限值大体可比。另外，任何射频功能（例如智能/联网冰箱中的Wi-Fi或蓝牙）受津巴布韦邮电监管局（POTRAZ）管辖，该机构负责无线电及电信设备的型号核准/授权；联网器具通常须在电气安全及电磁兼容符合性之外另行取得POTRAZ型号核准。基础非联网冰箱无射频功能，不在POTRAZ范围内。
summary.zht: 辛巴威不設歐盟意義上的單一橫向電磁相容指令。家用器具的電磁騷擾通過SAZ從國際CISPR 14族採用的ZWS標準管理——CISPR 14-1（發射）和CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）——通常經IEC/SANS採用對應，並在適用時通過SAZ合格評定或進口檢驗核實。中國GB 4343系列同樣以CISPR 14國際標準為基礎，因此底層發射/抗擾度限值大體可比。另外，任何射頻功能（例如智慧/聯網冰箱中的Wi-Fi或藍牙）受辛巴威郵電監管局（POTRAZ）管轄，該機構負責無線電及電信設備的型號核准/授權；聯網器具通常須在電氣安全及電磁相容符合性之外另行取得POTRAZ型號核准。基礎非聯網冰箱無射頻功能，不在POTRAZ範圍內。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (international basis adopted as ZWS via SAZ; mirrored by SANS)
CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (international basis adopted as ZWS via SAZ; mirrored by SANS)
Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — adoption of EMC standards and conformity assessment
Postal and Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Zimbabwe (POTRAZ) — type approval / authorisation of radio equipment (applies only if the appliance has Wi-Fi/Bluetooth or other RF function)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances are primarily GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), enforced under the CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA. For harmonic emissions GB 17625.1 applies. Because GB 4343 and the Zimbabwe-adopted ZWS EMC standards share the same CISPR 14 international parent, the technical limits are broadly comparable; however a Chinese GB 4343.1 test report is not automatically accepted by SAZ and does not substitute for any required SAZ conformity assessment or POTRAZ radio type approval.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的电磁兼容要求主要为GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015），在CCC制度下由SAMR/CNCA执行。谐波发射适用GB 17625.1。由于GB 4343与津巴布韦采用的ZWS电磁兼容标准同源于CISPR 14国际标准，技术限值大体可比；但中国GB 4343.1检测报告不被SAZ自动接受，且不能替代任何所需的SAZ合格评定或POTRAZ无线电型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的電磁相容要求主要為GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015），在CCC制度下由SAMR/CNCA執行。諧波發射適用GB 17625.1。由於GB 4343與辛巴威採用的ZWS電磁相容標準同源於CISPR 14國際標準，技術限值大體可比；但中國GB 4343.1檢測報告不被SAZ自動接受，且不能替代任何所需的SAZ合格評定或POTRAZ無線電型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2)

gap.en: Because GB 4343 and Zimbabwe-adopted ZWS EMC standards share the CISPR 14 international parent, the technical emission/immunity content is broadly comparable, so the gap is mainly procedural plus a radio carve-out: (1) Acceptance route — a Chinese GB 4343.1 test report is not automatically accepted; exporters should provide a CISPR 14-based test report (ideally referencing the international CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2 editions) for SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection. (2) Radio function — unlike a plain refrigerator, a smart/connected refrigerator with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth requires POTRAZ type approval for the radio module; this is an additional, separate authorisation with no Chinese CCC equivalent that transfers. (3) No EU-style horizontal EMC directive — Zimbabwe has no single CE/EMC-directive analogue, so requirements are confirmed per the specific ZWS standard and the SAZ/POTRAZ route rather than a blanket marking. Confirm with SAZ which EMC standard edition applies and with POTRAZ whether any RF function triggers type approval.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4343与津巴布韦采用的ZWS电磁兼容标准同源于CISPR 14国际标准，技术发射/抗扰度内容大体可比，因此差距主要为程序性，外加无线电单独管理：（1）接受路径——中国GB 4343.1检测报告不被自动接受；出口商应提供基于CISPR 14的检测报告（理想情况下引用国际CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2版本）用于SAZ合格评定/进口检验。（2）无线电功能——与普通冰箱不同，带Wi-Fi或蓝牙的智能/联网冰箱须就无线电模块取得POTRAZ型号核准；这是一项额外、独立的授权，无可转移的中国CCC等效。（3）无欧盟式横向电磁兼容指令——津巴布韦无单一CE/电磁兼容指令对应物，故要求须按具体ZWS标准及SAZ/POTRAZ路径确认，而非统一标志。须向SAZ确认适用的电磁兼容标准版本，并向POTRAZ确认任何射频功能是否触发型号核准。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4343與辛巴威採用的ZWS電磁相容標準同源於CISPR 14國際標準，技術發射/抗擾度內容大體可比，因此差距主要為程序性，外加無線電單獨管理：（1）接受路徑——中國GB 4343.1檢測報告不被自動接受；出口商應提供基於CISPR 14的檢測報告（理想情況下引用國際CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2版本）用於SAZ合格評定/進口檢驗。（2）無線電功能——與普通冰箱不同，帶Wi-Fi或藍牙的智慧/聯網冰箱須就無線電模組取得POTRAZ型號核准；這是一項額外、獨立的授權，無可轉移的中國CCC等效。（3）無歐盟式橫向電磁相容指令——辛巴威無單一CE/電磁相容指令對應物，故要求須按具體ZWS標準及SAZ/POTRAZ路徑確認，而非統一標誌。須向SAZ確認適用的電磁相容標準版本，並向POTRAZ確認任何射頻功能是否觸發型號核准。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC to CISPR 14 (ZWS via SAZ) is the recognised baseline, verified through SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection where applicable; POTRAZ radio type approval is mandatory only if the appliance includes Wi-Fi/Bluetooth or other RF function. Exact scope should be confirmed with SAZ/POTRAZ.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Postal and Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Zimbabwe (POTRAZ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Zimbabwe, household-appliance EMC follows ZWS standards adopted from CISPR 14 via SAZ, broadly comparable to China's GB 4343 (same CISPR 14 parent), but a GB report is not automatically accepted — provide CISPR 14-based evidence for SAZ conformity assessment. A connected refrigerator with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth additionally needs POTRAZ radio type approval. A plain non-connected refrigerator is outside POTRAZ scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于津巴布韦，家用器具电磁兼容遵循由SAZ从CISPR 14采用的ZWS标准，与中国GB 4343（同源CISPR 14）大体可比，但GB报告不被自动接受——须提供基于CISPR 14的证据用于SAZ合格评定。带Wi-Fi/蓝牙的联网冰箱另须取得POTRAZ无线电型号核准。普通非联网冰箱不在POTRAZ范围内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於辛巴威，家用器具電磁相容遵循由SAZ從CISPR 14採用的ZWS標準，與中國GB 4343（同源CISPR 14）大體可比，但GB報告不被自動接受——須提供基於CISPR 14的證據用於SAZ合格評定。帶Wi-Fi/藍牙的聯網冰箱另須取得POTRAZ無線電型號核准。普通非聯網冰箱不在POTRAZ範圍內。
